title: Gate step output
description: Result of a gate_step decision by a human (or other principal). Persisted as the durable record of the approval / rejection. Engine maps decision → transition via the gate_step's outputs map.

approver.description: Username, role label, or agent identifier of who decided.

comment.description: Optional free-form note explaining the decision. Audited but does not affect transition.

form_data.description: Values submitted via the gate's form fields, keyed by field.name. Strings (text/textarea/select) or booleans (checkbox).
